TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Law-ceŤÄĀŚ≠ź == nikaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ caay ka tinengi ku niyadu'śēÖťáĆšĻčŤĺĮ caay ka tineng ku pilecuhan ni Law-ce, i cudad inai' ku katinengan nu pilecuhan ni Law-ce, uydasa ni Se-ma-cin a ni sulitan, Cu u sumamaday a Cu-kuo, Ku-sin aydaay nu Lu-yi-sin, Li-niyadu' u Sin-cen-tun a Tay-cin-kun niyadu', Cei-ze-li aydaay nu Cin-cen-hu kitidaan - Tay-cin-kun-cen. 44 Law-ce" nu ayawan linpic cay mihcaan- nu ayawan sippic cay mihcaan", pilecuhan i Tun-cuo a Cu-kuo Ku-sin Li-sen-ceu-zei-li. cun-cen-ciw se-sing-cia, mueneng i Sye-tay-kun-yen-san. ŤÄĀŚ≠źŚČć(571ŚĻī‚ÄĒŚČć471ŚĻī), . palitaen ni Kun-ce Ś≠ĒŚ≠źŚēŹťĀď nikudan kainai' en tu nu Tun-cuo wan-se, tatengan idaw kina ci Cuo-tin-ce, cilaw ku yadahay nu niyadu'an, mangalay namin malatahudan, ci Li-pen-le-hay matulin tu tusa a lasubu nu pina a mihcaan. ci Cuo-sing-wan sabaw tu pitu mihcaan, sikawaw tu " ce-tay-ce-lun", bahbahan patayda i sawacan, hatidaay tu nu cudadan maalaw patayda i Cu-kuo a Kuo-du, ales han ci Law-ce. samuhmuh satu ci Law-ce, malalacal sa aci Kun-ce. . Law-ceŤÄĀŚ≠ź saan, tawya mala sakakaay ci Law-ce caay kalesem makaadih tu Cuo-caw mademec, tawya miculimek namakayda i Ku-kun a tahekal nu ayawan, tawya maadih tu sakakaay ci " Kung-lin", katayni palabang han, mangalay papisakamu ci Cuo-lian. Idawya ci Li-zan sakamusa, tuci Yi-si-taw, " idaw ku cudad ni Law-ce tu " taw-de-cin", malatusa, pabaay a cudad u "taw-de", tada i hekal ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu cancanan, palutatengan ku di'di'tusa, sasaay nu cudadan u " de-cin" sakay tademaw kuyda, hican taayaw tadikud a kamuan, kya matenens ku hican misuayaw tu tademaw sa. caay ka hedek ku nipinanaman, mangelu' minanam, sadikuday idaw ku laheci." uyni sat uku liwan, kacaw satu katalan mulaliw. ÁõłŚā≥, . tina kungkuan, ci Yi-si i pasayda i lala' sakamusa, maadih ku walian salungan ku demiad, takelal sa, mahicaay kiya ku demiad, tanunamuh sa, tabaki ku ngiha " namaka walian ku kapah nu demiad, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu tademaw makayda". katuud ku tademaw nai' ku lawad miasik, mihalhal tu nikatayni nu tademaw, i Ku-kun nu panapananan ni sulitan tu hudi saan " ce-ci-tun-lay" sepat kina tabakiay ni sulitan, katukuh ayda, sisa sumamad u " ce-ci-tun-lay-han-ku-kan, lima a malebut ku cud ani Law-ce". ". udip a nidatengan ŚÄčšļļśÄĚśÉ≥ ci Law-ce u milingatuay misulit tu taw-cia a tademaw, sakaudip pakunida sananay, kasikadan ku kamu, hatedep han, acaay kacacinlaw atu taw. sakay cen-ce hamin han pasu adidiay nu tademawan a mikuwan, idaw ku cacayay nu kamu ni Law-ce, " matineng ku pabaway, anu idaw ku la'cusay hida hantu, anu mahica ku kamu nu taw, hidan tu sa.", anu mangalay ku binawlan, sayadahen ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapatay ku binawlan, miyukiw kita tu siidaay nu tademaw, caay ka patay ku binawla, uyca ka talawan mapatay sa." ." kapatayanŚéĽšłĖ Law-ce hedek nu mihcaan itida i Di-taw-hu mapatay. nikapatayan ni Law-ce a siwmian. . mala bunsan ci Law-cean saŤÄĀŚ≠źŚĆĖŤÉ°Ť™™ idaw ku sananay caay henay ka patay ci Law-ce sa, katukuh i Si-yi, pasakamuen ku Si-yi a tademaw, uyni u kamusa " Law-ce-hua-hu". Law-ce-hua-hu inakamu namaka Tun-han, han-hen-ti-yen-si siwa mihcaan " caylimlim mihcaan" ida i cuda nu sing-cea " idaw ku sananay ci Law-cean tayda i Yi-di malabunsan" a sasakamuen. "ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē. daw-ciw atu tay-sang-law-cunťĀďśēôŚíĆŚ§™šłäŤÄĀŚźõ daw-ciw taneng talaayaw taydan nu sumamad nu syakay Cuo-kuo tademaw a kawawan, nikudan haymawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, hun-law-daw nu dadatengan, sisa, ci Law-ce u daw-cu han nu tademaw. sa u daw-ciw nu disi saan, ci Law-ce u tay-cen nu di'tuan. An-hua-wo-yen a Law-ce nakamuan itida i Wo-yen dadaydaysa, u kamu sa ku dadaydayan, bangcal ku kamu, idaw ku talakaway a nikinkiwan nu'puc a cudadan, malatusa kina kawaw, sayaway namakawawa katukuh tu balaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakay ci Law-ce atu ten-cin-kun a nakamuan. ina Wo-yen ten-cin-kun tataydaan midang atu Kan-aw a binacadan mapulung mihedek a masanga. mahiniay a Law-ce anunamakapina tu nu malebut a mihcaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidaydayan nu kakungkuan, matineng ku paylumaluma' ay nu tademawan, malenec tu a mitengil. . Law-cun-yun ba'tuŤÄĀŚźõŚ≤© itida i Ci-iun buyu idaw ku mahida u tademaw a tabakiay nu ba'tuan mahida nipituktukan a cun-ciw zitay midatengay nu lumaan ci Law-ce a sasing, pangangan han Law-cun-yun ba'tu. Law-cun-yun ba'tu patideng i Sung-yun a zitayan, u Cung-kuo ayda satabakiay a Sun-tay daw-ciw a ba'tu nu sasingan, u Cin-yun buyu tataydaan midang, bangcal ku nituktukan, malalikisi atu nalimaan a epucan.
S.PHON: == r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô** == nikaudipan** ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči ku nijadu Ē~ °**** ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč ku pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô, i ¶udad inai Ē~ ° ku katin…ôŇčan nu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô, ujdasa ni s…ô-ma- ¶in a ni sur~…ĺitan, ¶u u sumamadaj a ¶u-kuo, ku-sin ajdaaj nu r~…ĺu-ji-sin, r~…ĺi-nijadu Ē~ ° u sin- ¶…ôn-tun a taj- ¶in-kun nijadu Ē~ °, ¶…ôi-z…ô-r~…ĺi ajdaaj nu ¶in- ¶…ôn-ńßu kitidaan - taj- ¶in-kun- ¶…ôn. ** r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô" nu ajawan r~…ĺinpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan- nu ajawan sippi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan", pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tun- ¶uo a ¶u-kuo ku-sin r~…ĺi-s…ôn- ¶…ôu-z…ôi-r~…ĺi. ¶un- ¶…ôn- ¶iw s…ô-siŇč- ¶ia, mu…ôn…ôŇč i sj…ô-taj-kun-j…ôn-san. ***(**********), . par~…ĺita…ôn ni kun- ¶…ô **** nikudan kainai Ē~ ° …ôn tu nu tun- ¶uo wan-s…ô, tat…ôŇčan idaw kina ¶i ¶uo-tin- ¶…ô, ¶ir~…ĺaw ku jadańßaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an, maŇčar~…ĺaj namin mar~…ĺatańßudan, ¶i r~…ĺi-p…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô-ńßaj matur~…ĺin tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu nu pina a mińß ¶aan. ¶i ¶uo-siŇč-wan sabaw tu pitu mińß ¶aan, sikawaw tu " ¶…ô-taj- ¶…ô-r~…ĺun", bańßbańßan patajda i sawa ¶an, ńßatidaaj tu nu ¶udadan maar~…ĺaw patajda i ¶u-kuo a kuo-du, ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô. samuńßmuńß satu ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ sa a ¶i kun- ¶…ô. . r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô** saan, tawja mar~…ĺa sakakaaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôm makaadińß tu ¶uo- ¶aw mad…ôm…ô ¶, tawja mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk namakajda i ku-kun a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ajawan, tawja maadińß tu sakakaaj ¶i " kuŇč-r~…ĺin", katajni par~…ĺabaŇč ńßan, maŇčar~…ĺaj papisakamu ¶i ¶uo-r~…ĺian. idawja ¶i r~…ĺi-zan sakamusa, tu ¶i ji-si-taw, " idaw ku ¶udad ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô tu " taw-d…ô- ¶in", mar~…ĺatusa, pabaaj a ¶udad u "taw-d…ô", tada i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu ¶an ¶anan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku di Ē~ °di Ē~ °tusa, sasaaj nu ¶udadan u " d…ô- ¶in" sakaj tad…ômaw kujda, ńßi ¶an taajaw tadikud a kamuan, kja mat…ôn…ôns ku ńßi ¶an misuajaw tu tad…ômaw sa. ¶aaj ka ńß…ôd…ôk ku nipinanaman, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° minanam, sadikudaj idaw ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i." ujni sat uku r~…ĺiwan, ka ¶aw satu katar~…ĺan mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw. **, . tina kuŇčkuan, ¶i ji-si i pasajda i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sakamusa, maadińß ku war~…ĺian sar~…ĺuŇčan ku d…ômiad, tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa, mańßi ¶aaj kija ku d…ômiad, tanunamuńß sa, tabaki ku Ňčińßa " namaka war~…ĺian ku kapańß nu d…ômiad, idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu tad…ômaw makajda". katuud ku tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺawad miasik, mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu nikatajni nu tad…ômaw, i ku-kun nu panapananan ni sur~…ĺitan tu ńßudi saan " ¶…ô- ¶i-tun-r~…ĺaj" s…ôpat kina tabakiaj ni sur~…ĺitan, katukuńß ajda, sisa sumamad u " ¶…ô- ¶i-tun-r~…ĺaj-ńßan-ku-kan, r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku ¶ud ani r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô". ". udip a nidat…ôŇčan **** ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj misur~…ĺit tu taw- ¶ia a tad…ômaw, sakaudip pakunida sananaj, kasikadan ku kamu, ńßat…ôd…ôp ńßan, a ¶aaj ka ¶a ¶inr~…ĺaw atu taw. sakaj ¶…ôn- ¶…ô ńßamin ńßan pasu adidiaj nu tad…ômawan a mikuwan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu kamu ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô, " matin…ôŇč ku pabawaj, anu idaw ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj ńßida ńßantu, anu mańßi ¶a ku kamu nu taw, ńßidan tu sa.", anu maŇčar~…ĺaj ku binawr~…ĺan, sajadańß…ôn ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapataj ku binawr~…ĺan, mijukiw kita tu siidaaj nu tad…ômaw, ¶aaj ka pataj ku binawr~…ĺa, uj ¶a ka tar~…ĺawan mapataj sa." ." kapatajan** r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô ńß…ôd…ôk nu mińß ¶aan itida i di-taw-ńßu mapataj. nikapatajan ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô a siwmian. . mar~…ĺa bunsan ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ôan sa***** idaw ku sananaj ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka pataj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô sa, katukuńß i si-ji, pasakamu…ôn ku si-ji a tad…ômaw, ujni u kamusa " r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô-ńßua-ńßu". r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô-ńßua-ńßu inakamu namaka tun-ńßan, ńßan-ńß…ôn-ti-j…ôn-si siwa mińß ¶aan " ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan" ida i ¶uda nu siŇč- ¶…ôa " idaw ku sananaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ôan tajda i ji-di mar~…ĺabunsan" a sasakamu…ôn. "***. daw- ¶iw atu taj-saŇč-r~…ĺaw- ¶un******* daw- ¶iw tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw tajdan nu sumamad nu sjakaj ¶uo-kuo tad…ômaw a kawawan, nikudan ńßajmawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, ńßun-r~…ĺaw-daw nu dadat…ôŇčan, sisa, ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u daw- ¶u ńßan nu tad…ômaw. sa u daw- ¶iw nu disi saan, ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u taj- ¶…ôn nu di Ē~ °tuan. an-ńßua-wo-j…ôn a r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô nakamuan itida i wo-j…ôn dadajdajsa, u kamu sa ku dadajdajan, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku kamu, idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a nikinkiwan nu Ē~ °pu ¶ a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺatusa kina kawaw, sajawaj namakawawa katukuńß tu bar~…ĺaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô atu t…ôn- ¶in-kun a nakamuan. ina wo-j…ôn t…ôn- ¶in-kun tatajdaan midaŇč atu kan-aw a bina ¶adan mapur~…ĺuŇč mińß…ôd…ôk a masaŇča. mańßiniaj a r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô anunamakapina tu nu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan nu kakakunkuan atu nidajdajan nu kakuŇčkuan, matin…ôŇč ku pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aj nu tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺ…ôn…ô ¶ tu a mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. . r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu*** itida i ¶i-iun buju idaw ku mańßida u tad…ômaw a tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan mańßida nipituktukan a ¶un- ¶iw zitaj midat…ôŇčaj nu r~…ĺumaan ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô a sasiŇč, paŇčaŇčan ńßan r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu. r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu patid…ôŇč i suŇč-jun a zitajan, u ¶uŇč-kuo ajda satabakiaj a sun-taj daw- ¶iw a ba Ē~ °tu nu sasiŇčan, u ¶in-jun buju tatajdaan midaŇč, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku nituktukan, mar~…ĺar~…ĺikisi atu nar~…ĺimaan a …ôpu ¶an.
S.FORM: == Law-ceŤÄĀŚ≠ź == nikaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ caay ka tinengi ku niyadu'śēÖťáĆšĻčŤĺĮ caay ka tineng ku pilecuhan ni Law-ce, i cudad inai' ku katinengan nu pilecuhan ni Law-ce, uydasa ni Se-ma-cin a ni sulitan, Cu u sumamaday a Cu-kuo, Ku-sin aydaay nu Lu-yi-sin, Li-niyadu' u Sin-cen-tun a Tay-cin-kun niyadu', Cei-ze-li aydaay nu Cin-cen-hu kitidaan - Tay-cin-kun-cen. 44 Law-ce" nu ayawan linpic cay mihcaan- nu ayawan sippic cay mihcaan", pilecuhan i Tun-cuo a Cu-kuo Ku-sin Li-sen-ceu-zei-li. cun-cen-ciw se-sing-cia, mueneng i Sye-tay-kun-yen-san. ŤÄĀŚ≠źŚČć(571ŚĻī‚ÄĒŚČć471ŚĻī), . palitaen ni Kun-ce Ś≠ĒŚ≠źŚēŹťĀď nikudan kainai' en tu nu Tun-cuo wan-se, tatengan idaw kina ci Cuo-tin-ce, cilaw ku yadahay nu niyadu'an, mangalay namin malatahudan, ci Li-pen-le-hay matulin tu tusa a lasubu nu pina a mihcaan. ci Cuo-sing-wan sabaw tu pitu mihcaan, sikawaw tu " ce-tay-ce-lun", bahbahan patayda i sawacan, hatidaay tu nu cudadan maalaw patayda i Cu-kuo a Kuo-du, ales han ci Law-ce. samuhmuh satu ci Law-ce, malalacal sa aci Kun-ce. . Law-ceŤÄĀŚ≠ź saan, tawya mala sakakaay ci Law-ce caay kalesem makaadih tu Cuo-caw mademec, tawya miculimek namakayda i Ku-kun a tahekal nu ayawan, tawya maadih tu sakakaay ci " Kung-lin", katayni palabang han, mangalay papisakamu ci Cuo-lian. Idawya ci Li-zan sakamusa, tuci Yi-si-taw, " idaw ku cudad ni Law-ce tu " taw-de-cin", malatusa, pabaay a cudad u "taw-de", tada i hekal ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu cancanan, palutatengan ku di'di'tusa, sasaay nu cudadan u " de-cin" sakay tademaw kuyda, hican taayaw tadikud a kamuan, kya matenens ku hican misuayaw tu tademaw sa. caay ka hedek ku nipinanaman, mangelu' minanam, sadikuday idaw ku laheci." uyni sat uku liwan, kacaw satu katalan mulaliw. ÁõłŚā≥, . tina kungkuan, ci Yi-si i pasayda i lala' sakamusa, maadih ku walian salungan ku demiad, takelal sa, mahicaay kiya ku demiad, tanunamuh sa, tabaki ku ngiha " namaka walian ku kapah nu demiad, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu tademaw makayda". katuud ku tademaw nai' ku lawad miasik, mihalhal tu nikatayni nu tademaw, i Ku-kun nu panapananan ni sulitan tu hudi saan " ce-ci-tun-lay" sepat kina tabakiay ni sulitan, katukuh ayda, sisa sumamad u " ce-ci-tun-lay-han-ku-kan, lima a malebut ku cud ani Law-ce". ". udip a nidatengan ŚÄčšļļśÄĚśÉ≥ ci Law-ce u milingatuay misulit tu taw-cia a tademaw, sakaudip pakunida sananay, kasikadan ku kamu, hatedep han, acaay kacacinlaw atu taw. sakay cen-ce hamin han pasu adidiay nu tademawan a mikuwan, idaw ku cacayay nu kamu ni Law-ce, " matineng ku pabaway, anu idaw ku la'cusay hida hantu, anu mahica ku kamu nu taw, hidan tu sa.", anu mangalay ku binawlan, sayadahen ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapatay ku binawlan, miyukiw kita tu siidaay nu tademaw, caay ka patay ku binawla, uyca ka talawan mapatay sa." ." kapatayanŚéĽšłĖ Law-ce hedek nu mihcaan itida i Di-taw-hu mapatay. nikapatayan ni Law-ce a siwmian. . mala bunsan ci Law-cean saŤÄĀŚ≠źŚĆĖŤÉ°Ť™™ idaw ku sananay caay henay ka patay ci Law-ce sa, katukuh i Si-yi, pasakamuen ku Si-yi a tademaw, uyni u kamusa " Law-ce-hua-hu". Law-ce-hua-hu inakamu namaka Tun-han, han-hen-ti-yen-si siwa mihcaan " caylimlim mihcaan" ida i cuda nu sing-cea " idaw ku sananay ci Law-cean tayda i Yi-di malabunsan" a sasakamuen. "ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē. daw-ciw atu tay-sang-law-cunťĀďśēôŚíĆŚ§™šłäŤÄĀŚźõ daw-ciw taneng talaayaw taydan nu sumamad nu syakay Cuo-kuo tademaw a kawawan, nikudan haymawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, hun-law-daw nu dadatengan, sisa, ci Law-ce u daw-cu han nu tademaw. sa u daw-ciw nu disi saan, ci Law-ce u tay-cen nu di'tuan. An-hua-wo-yen a Law-ce nakamuan itida i Wo-yen dadaydaysa, u kamu sa ku dadaydayan, bangcal ku kamu, idaw ku talakaway a nikinkiwan nu'puc a cudadan, malatusa kina kawaw, sayaway namakawawa katukuh tu balaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakay ci Law-ce atu ten-cin-kun a nakamuan. ina Wo-yen ten-cin-kun tataydaan midang atu Kan-aw a binacadan mapulung mihedek a masanga. mahiniay a Law-ce anunamakapina tu nu malebut a mihcaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidaydayan nu kakungkuan, matineng ku paylumaluma' ay nu tademawan, malenec tu a mitengil. . Law-cun-yun ba'tuŤÄĀŚźõŚ≤© itida i Ci-iun buyu idaw ku mahida u tademaw a tabakiay nu ba'tuan mahida nipituktukan a cun-ciw zitay midatengay nu lumaan ci Law-ce a sasing, pangangan han Law-cun-yun ba'tu. Law-cun-yun ba'tu patideng i Sung-yun a zitayan, u Cung-kuo ayda satabakiay a Sun-tay daw-ciw a ba'tu nu sasingan, u Cin-yun buyu tataydaan midang, bangcal ku nituktukan, malalikisi atu nalimaan a epucan.

kitidaan - taj- ¶in-kun- ¶…ôn. ** r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô" nu ajawan r~…ĺinpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan- nu ajawan sippi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan", pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tun- ¶uo a ¶u-kuo ku-sin r~…ĺi-s…ôn- ¶…ôu-z…ôi-r~…ĺi. ¶un- ¶…ôn- ¶iw s…ô-siŇč- ¶ia, mu…ôn…ôŇč i sj…ô-taj-kun-j…ôn-san. ***(**********), . par~…ĺita…ôn ni kun- ¶…ô **** nikudan kainai Ē~ ° …ôn tu nu tun- ¶uo wan-s…ô, tat…ôŇčan idaw kina ¶i ¶uo-tin- ¶…ô, ¶ir~…ĺaw ku jadańßaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an, maŇčar~…ĺaj namin mar~…ĺatańßudan, ¶i r~…ĺi-p…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô-ńßaj matur~…ĺin tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu nu pina a mińß ¶aan. ¶i ¶uo-siŇč-wan sabaw tu pitu mińß ¶aan, sikawaw tu " ¶i kun- ¶…ô. . r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô** saan, tawja mar~…ĺa sakakaaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôs…ôm makaadińß tu ¶uo- ¶aw mad…ôm…ô ¶, tawja mi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk namakajda i ku-kun a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ajawan, tawja maadińß tu sakakaaj ¶i " kuŇč-r~…ĺin", katajni par~…ĺabaŇč ńßan, maŇčar~…ĺaj papisakamu ¶i ¶uo-r~…ĺian. idawja ¶i r~…ĺi-zan sakamusa, tu ¶i ji-si-taw, " idaw ku ¶udad ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô tu " taw-d…ô- ¶in", mar~…ĺatusa, pabaaj a ¶udad u "taw-d…ô", tada i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu ¶an ¶anan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku di Ē~ °di Ē~ °tusa, sasaaj nu ¶udadan u " d…ô- ¶in" sakaj tad…ômaw kujda, ńßi ¶an taajaw tadikud a kamuan, kja mat…ôn…ôns ku ńßi ¶an misuajaw tu tad…ômaw sa. ¶aaj ka ńß…ôd…ôk ku nipinanaman, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° minanam, sadikudaj idaw ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i." ujni sat uku r~…ĺiwan, ka ¶aw satu katar~…ĺan mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw. **, . tina kuŇčkuan, ¶i ji-si i pasajda i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sakamusa, maadińß ku war~…ĺian sar~…ĺuŇčan ku d…ômiad, tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa, mańßi ¶aaj kija ku d…ômiad, tanunamuńß sa, tabaki ku Ňčińßa " namaka war~…ĺian ku kapańß nu d…ômiad, idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu tad…ômaw makajda". katuud ku tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺawad miasik, mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tu nikatajni nu tad…ômaw, i ku-kun nu panapananan ni sur~…ĺitan tu ńßudi saan " ¶…ô- ¶i-tun-r~…ĺaj" s…ôpat kina tabakiaj ni sur~…ĺitan, katukuńß ajda, sisa sumamad u " ¶…ô- ¶i-tun-r~…ĺaj-ńßan-ku-kan, r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku ¶ud ani r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô". ". udip a nidat…ôŇčan **** ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj misur~…ĺit tu taw- ¶ia a tad…ômaw, sakaudip pakunida sananaj, kasikadan ku kamu, ńßat…ôd…ôp ńßan, a ¶aaj ka ¶a ¶inr~…ĺaw atu taw. sakaj ¶…ôn- ¶…ô ńßamin ńßan pasu adidiaj nu tad…ômawan a mikuwan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu kamu ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô, " matin…ôŇč ku pabawaj, anu idaw ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj ńßida ńßantu, anu mańßi ¶a ku kamu nu taw, ńßidan tu sa.", anu maŇčar~…ĺaj ku binawr~…ĺan, sajadańß…ôn ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapataj ku binawr~…ĺan, mijukiw kita tu siidaaj nu tad…ômaw, ¶aaj ka pataj ku binawr~…ĺa, uj ¶a ka tar~…ĺawan mapataj sa." ." kapatajan** r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô ńß…ôd…ôk nu mińß ¶aan itida i di-taw-ńßu mapataj. nikapatajan ni r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô a siwmian. . mar~…ĺa bunsan ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ôan sa***** idaw ku sananaj ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka pataj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô sa, katukuńß i si-ji, pasakamu…ôn ku si-ji a tad…ômaw, ujni u kamusa " r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô-ńßua-ńßu". r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô-ńßua-ńßu inakamu namaka tun-ńßan, ńßan-ńß…ôn-ti-j…ôn-si siwa mińß ¶aan " ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan" ida i ¶uda nu siŇč- ¶…ôa " idaw ku sananaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ôan tajda i ji-di mar~…ĺabunsan" a sasakamu…ôn. "***. daw- ¶iw atu taj-saŇč-r~…ĺaw- ¶un******* daw- ¶iw tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw tajdan nu sumamad nu sjakaj ¶uo-kuo tad…ômaw a kawawan, nikudan ńßajmawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, ńßun-r~…ĺaw-daw nu dadat…ôŇčan, sisa, ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u daw- ¶u ńßan nu tad…ômaw. sa u daw- ¶iw nu disi saan, ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô u taj- ¶…ôn nu di Ē~ °tuan. an-ńßua-wo-j…ôn a r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô nakamuan itida i wo-j…ôn dadajdajsa, u kamu sa ku dadajdajan, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku kamu, idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a nikinkiwan nu Ē~ °pu ¶ a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺatusa kina kawaw, sajawaj namakawawa katukuńß tu bar~…ĺaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakaj ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô atu t…ôn- ¶in-kun a nakamuan. ina wo-j…ôn t…ôn- ¶in-kun tatajdaan midaŇč atu kan-aw a bina ¶adan mapur~…ĺuŇč mińß…ôd…ôk a masaŇča. mańßiniaj a r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô anunamakapina tu nu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan nu kakakunkuan atu nidajdajan nu kakuŇčkuan, matin…ôŇč ku pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aj nu tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺ…ôn…ô ¶ tu a mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. . r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu*** itida i ¶i-iun buju idaw ku mańßida u tad…ômaw a tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan mańßida nipituktukan a ¶un- ¶iw zitaj midat…ôŇčaj nu r~…ĺumaan ¶i r~…ĺaw- ¶…ô a sasiŇč, paŇčaŇčan ńßan r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu. r~…ĺaw- ¶un-jun ba Ē~ °tu patid…ôŇč i suŇč-jun a zitajan, u ¶uŇč-kuo ajda satabakiaj a sun-taj daw- ¶iw a ba Ē~ °tu nu sasiŇčan, u ¶in-jun buju tatajdaan midaŇč, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku nituktukan, mar~…ĺar~…ĺikisi atu nar~…ĺimaan a …ôpu ¶an.
